name: ANC: Door-to-Door Service Delivery Audit
objective: Verify voter details and household satisfaction in Soweto.
mainMessage: ANC: Together we can do more. We are here to listen and resolve your service delivery concerns.
talkingPoints: Housing: Verify status of RDP housing applications.
NHI: Educate on the benefits of the National Health Insurance.
Jobs: Discuss local internship and job opportunities for youth.

questions.prompt: Are you satisfied with local waste removal?

name: ANC: Community Gathering Drive
objective: Engage community leaders and influencers in Ward 42.
mainMessage: Defending Democracy: Building our communities together.
talkingPoints: Community Safety: Strengthening neighborhood watch groups.
Land: Progress on communal land rights and titles.

name: ANC: Gauteng Mega-Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming manifesto launches and policy shifts.
mainMessage: Join the Movement: Tomorrow at Orlando Stadium for the People's Assembly. A better life for all!

name: ANC Soweto Peoples Rally
objective: Demonstrate grassroots strength in Soweto and outline the 2026 Renewal Plan.
mainMessage: ANC: Renewing the mandate for social justice and economic transformation.
talkingPoints: NHI Implementation: Quality healthcare for all South Africans.
Social Grants: Protecting the most vulnerable through sustainable funding.
